This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. 2026-04-01T22:07:30.3837227Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-01T22:07:30.3837604Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-01T22:07:30.3837807Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-01T22:07:30.3838015Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-01T22:07:30.3838335Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-01T22:07:30.3838463Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
